metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, REAPER insertion, and Transfer workflow.

version.name: 0.7.10-beta.14
version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Fixes a ReaImGui assertion when opening the Pitch, Rate, or Gain editor. - Preserves Enter, Escape, focus-loss, reset, drag, and wheel parameter behavior. - Prevents Transfer input labels from being clipped at the right scrollbar. - Adds logical-library and waveform-to-REAPER workflow animations to the guides. - Adds localized Transfer settings screenshots to the bilingual guides.
